{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324000656A695B0F99FC85236C3BC"}"},"total":24},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610101696220611353","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还不错的同人，是可以拜读的佳作，期待后续的发展"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771867592,"group_id":"7580183378037574718","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"智娜厨只接受智娜","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3FbWRD+42uW3Ylq6YmzMt0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b04c3623c67348eda292f2c5b996bf67~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776882424&x-signature=IE7r0FYwn0MmxoXlfkYxlxkvdgk%3D","user_id":"532634664711559","user_name":"文笔不行的奈源"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"532634664711559","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":5,"fan_ranklist_title":"自扬者","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1664201883,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7580183378037574718","book_info":{"abstract":"大家好啊，我是来自真新镇的小智，一位励志成为宝可梦大师的普通少年。
我曾经做过一个梦，一个长长的、关于我未来的——大师梦……
在梦里，我结识了很多很多的伙伴朋友，旅行了特别多的地区，参加了好多比赛——虽然过程不算顺利，但我也取得了很多的成绩哦。
在梦的最后，我参加了世界锦标赛，并一举夺魁——“世界第一！”当我取得了这个头衔的时候，我感觉，距离我成为宝可梦大师的梦想仅有一步之遥！
可惜，我还没有成为宝可梦大师，我就梦醒了。
“皮卡丘…”比雕、巴大蝴…
“小刚、小霞…”小建、小遥…
好真实的梦啊，就好像是我亲生经历了一样——但我知道，梦毕竟只是梦。哪怕梦里的我风光无限，但梦醒了，我还是那个真新镇的普通少年。
不过，不打紧，我，来自真新镇的小智，有信心达到、甚至是超越那个梦境里我所能达到的高度！
（多，而且很多）
（调整了很多设定，包括剧情、战力，等等）
（设定是原来的小智，但是文里表现吗……我尽量实现）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ab7961bd1ef5892621c602e4ccb24ba3~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"V55景","author_id":"","book_id":"7580183378037574718","book_name":"小智的后宫有些太多了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8e0d8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":859,"name":"宝可梦","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=859&name=宝可梦&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":371,"name":"神奇宝贝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=371&name=神奇宝贝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7580211173195252286","read_count":"28471","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"384743"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"157","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,宝可梦,二次元,神奇宝贝,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/094410f2cf6547a49b5f67a37b436151~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779466017&x-signature=wIGl83vgDEsbyzXyyzV69yZEqac%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3305608615040907","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"145"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324000656A695B0F99FC85236C3BC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":19665,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":2639},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1771868301,"author_reply_time":1772287935,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7619724250284950296","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好看，算是我近几年看过最好看的神奇宝贝同人之一
作者对于神奇宝贝对战的描写非常棒，热血沸腾并且有脑子
角色没有OOC，世界观并没有特别黑暗，和动漫差不多，不过添加了很多细节
主角依然是小智，不过有着后面各个时代的记忆（以梦境形式得到），并且变聪明了不少
后宫文，听作者说会收动漫女主，特别篇女主，以及一些作者喜欢的角色，目前30章已经有了三个女朋友（小霞，莎莉娜，小黄）","text_exts":[{"e":21,"s":17,"text":"神奇宝贝","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%A5%9E%E5%A5%87%E5%AE%9D%E8%B4%9D&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742820165236C3BC%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227619724250284950296%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227580183378037574718%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%A5%9E%E5%A5%87%E5%AE%9D%E8%B4%9D%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1774108292,"group_id":"7580183378037574718","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4HCF63yuQIuvl2NG1qxJUgqCdULQcLjyYgOLGZPA0n8","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/67071b187c4649c58011290fcad16e5a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776877747&x-signature=ZeoHsa%2FDOl2YbsmV0g%2FzqHKR8sQ%3D","user_id":"3921274452843024","user_name":"游客183638"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3921274452843024","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7580183378037574718","book_info":{"abstract":"大家好啊，我是来自真新镇的小智，一位励志成为宝可梦大师的普通少年。
